author: design-phase-1b-style-md-c138
content: Result: Implemented all vitreous_style types — Color (RGB/RGBA/hex/HSL constructors, lighten/darken/mix, 20 named constants, WCAG luminance/contrast), FontWeight/FontFamily/FontStyle/TextAlign/TextOverflow enums, Dimension/Edges/Corners with ergonomic From impls and pct() helper, Shadow/Transition/Animation/Keyframe/Easing/AnimatableProperty/AnimationIterations/AnimationDirection, Style struct aggregating all visual properties with CursorIcon and Overflow, Theme with light/dark/system presets meeting WCAG AA contrast. 58 tests, zero external deps, clippy clean, fmt clean.
